scenarios.name: basic_challenge
scenarios.description: Minimal challenge with only required fields
scenarios.wire: Payment id="ch_abc123", realm="api.example.com", method="tempo", intent="charge", request="eyJhbW91bnQiOiIxMDAwMDAwIiwiY3VycmVuY3kiOiIweDIwYzAwMDAwMDAwMDAwMDAwMDAwMDAwMDAwMDAwMDAwMDAwMDAwMDEiLCJyZWNpcGllbnQiOiIweDEyMzQ1Njc4OTBhYmNkZWYxMjM0NTY3ODkwYWJjZGVmMTIzNDU2NzgifQ"

scenarios.name: full_challenge
scenarios.description: Challenge with all optional fields
scenarios.wire: Payment id="ch_full123", realm="api.example.com", method="tempo", intent="charge", request="", description="API access payment required", digest="sha-256=X48E9qOokqqrvdts8nOJRJN3OWDUoyWxBf7kbu9DBPE=", expires="2026-01-29T12:05:00Z"

scenarios.name: empty_request
scenarios.description: Challenge with empty request object
scenarios.wire: Payment id="ch_empty", realm="test.example.com", method="tempo", intent="authorize", request="e30"

scenarios.name: nested_request
scenarios.description: Challenge with nested objects in request
scenarios.wire: Payment id="ch_nested", realm="api.example.com", method="tempo", intent="stream", request=""

scenarios.name: unescaped_quotes_in_description
scenarios.description: Unescaped quotes in description value — parsers truncate at quote boundary, remaining text is ignored
scenarios.wire: Payment id="ch_special", realm="api.example.com", method="tempo", intent="charge", request="eyJhbW91bnQiOiIxMDAifQ", description="Payment for "Premium" service — 50% off!"

scenarios.name: escaped_quotes_in_description
scenarios.description: Escaped quoted-string values preserve embedded quotes
scenarios.wire: Payment id="ch_escaped", realm="api.example.com", method="tempo", intent="charge", request="e30", description="Pay \"premium\" API"

scenarios.name: payment_keyword_in_quoted_realm
scenarios.description: The word 'Payment' inside a quoted parameter value must not be mistaken for a second auth scheme
scenarios.wire: Payment id="ch_qp_realm", realm="contact Payment support", method="tempo", intent="charge", request="e30"

scenarios.name: payment_keyword_in_quoted_description
scenarios.description: A quoted description containing 'Payment' is parsed as an opaque value, not a scheme boundary
scenarios.wire: Payment id="ch_qp_desc", realm="api.example.com", method="tempo", intent="charge", request="e30", description="Pay with the Payment scheme"

scenarios.name: adversarial_unclosed_quoted_extension
scenarios.description: Malformed quoted extension auth-param with many escapes is ignored without pathological parser backtracking

wire.prefix: Payment id="ch_redos", realm="api.example.com", method="tempo", intent="charge", request="e30", fuzz="

scenarios.name: error_missing_payment_prefix
scenarios.description: Rejects header without Payment prefix
scenarios.wire: Bearer token123

scenarios.name: error_missing_id
scenarios.description: Rejects challenge missing required id field
scenarios.wire: Payment realm="api", method="tempo", intent="charge", request="e30"

scenarios.name: error_missing_realm
scenarios.description: Rejects challenge missing required realm field
scenarios.wire: Payment id="abc", method="tempo", intent="charge", request="e30"

scenarios.name: error_missing_method
scenarios.description: Rejects challenge missing required method field
scenarios.wire: Payment id="abc", realm="api", intent="charge", request="e30"

scenarios.name: error_missing_intent
scenarios.description: Rejects challenge missing required intent field
scenarios.wire: Payment id="abc", realm="api", method="tempo", request="e30"

scenarios.name: error_missing_request
scenarios.description: Rejects challenge missing required request field
scenarios.wire: Payment id="abc", realm="api", method="tempo", intent="charge"

scenarios.name: error_invalid_base64url
scenarios.description: Rejects challenge with invalid base64url in request
scenarios.wire: Payment id="abc", realm="api", method="tempo", intent="charge", request="not-valid!!!"

scenarios.name: error_invalid_json
scenarios.description: Rejects challenge with valid base64url that decodes to non-JSON
scenarios.wire: Payment id="abc", realm="api", method="tempo", intent="charge", request="bm90IGpzb24"

scenarios.name: whitespace_tolerance
scenarios.description: Extra whitespace around separators is tolerated
scenarios.wire: Payment  id="ch_ws" ,  realm="api.example.com" ,  method="tempo" ,  intent="charge" ,  request="e30"

scenarios.name: parameter_order_independence
scenarios.description: Parameters in non-canonical order are parsed correctly
scenarios.wire: Payment request="e30", realm="api.example.com", intent="charge", id="ch_order", method="tempo"

scenarios.name: unknown_extension_parameter
scenarios.description: Unknown parameters are ignored during parsing
scenarios.wire: Payment id="ch_ext", realm="api.example.com", method="tempo", intent="charge", request="e30", foo="bar", baz="qux"

scenarios.name: case_insensitive_scheme
scenarios.description: Scheme name is case-insensitive per HTTP spec
scenarios.wire: payment id="ch_case", realm="api.example.com", method="tempo", intent="charge", request="e30"

scenarios.name: error_empty_id
scenarios.description: Rejects challenge with empty id value
scenarios.wire: Payment id="", realm="api", method="tempo", intent="charge", request="e30"

scenarios.name: error_duplicate_parameters
scenarios.description: Rejects challenge with duplicate parameter names
scenarios.wire: Payment id="a", realm="api", method="tempo", intent="charge", request="e30", id="b"

scenarios.name: error_empty_header
scenarios.description: Rejects completely empty header value

scenarios.name: error_scheme_only
scenarios.description: Rejects header with scheme name but no parameters
scenarios.wire: Payment
